## Archived Agents

Archived specs are preserved under `.github/agents/_archive/` and are not part of the active near-term roster.

## Rollout Notes

- FERROS Agent is elevated to top-level coordinator and delegates by domain.
- Coding and Business each have a domain owner plus architect role.
- Prompt generation and strict packet standards flow through `ferros-prompt-architect.agent.md`.
- New coding-family expansion should flow through `ferros-coding-agent-architect.agent.md`.
- New business-family expansion should flow through `ferros-business-agent-architect.agent.md`.
- Symbolic role naming should stay in display surfaces; capability-bearing runtime names remain explicit and safety-first.
- Orchestration/control-plane governance flows through `ferros-orchestration-architect.agent.md`. Only Operator or FERROS Agent may invoke it.
